jdbcService.sql: select t.id, t.task, t.started, t.owner, t.task_queue_id, t.correlation_id, t.context_id, last_sla.severity as lastSlaSeverity, last_sla.created as lastSlaCreated from ~tasks t join ~task_queues q on q.id = t.task_queue_id left join ( select tl.task_id, tl.severity, tl.created from ~task_logs tl join ( select task_id, max(created) as created from ~task_logs where code = 'SLA-BREACH' group by task_id ) latest on latest.task_id = tl.task_id and latest.created = tl.created where tl.code = 'SLA-BREACH' ) last_sla on last_sla.task_id = t.id where q.state in ('ACTIVE', 'PAUSED') and t.state = 'RUNNING' order by t.started asc
